problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
